org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf

Class PdfExporter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractVectorialExporter<PdfGraphics2D,PdfOutputStream>
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.pdf.PdfExporter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VectorialExporter
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    PdfTeXExporter

    public class PdfExporter
extends AbstractVectorialExporter<PdfGraphics2D,PdfOutputStream>
    This exporter permits to create a PDF file from a graphic context.

    This exporter supports the PDF 1.4 Reference Document.

    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      Character for the new line in the PDF file.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected PdfOutputStream createStream(File currentFile, OutputStream stream)
      Wrap the specified stream to a stream that may be properly used by the exporter.
      protected void finalizeExport(File currentFile, PdfOutputStream stream, Rectangle2f bounds, PdfGraphics2D graphicContext)
      Invoked to finalize the export.
      boolean isShadowSupported()
      Replies if this exporter is able to create shadows of the vectorials figures.
      boolean isSpecificationCompliant()
      Replies if this exporter is able to create a target file inside which all the specifications from ViewGraphics2D were supported.
      protected PdfGraphics2D prepareExport(File currentFile, PdfOutputStream stream, Rectangle2f bounds)
      Create the graphics context to use to export the data.

      Replies the size of the stream.

      Write the specified objects as strings in the output stream.

      Write the specified objects as strings in the output stream.

      Write a PDF dictionary from the specified collection of objects.
      protected static void writePdfObject(int id, PdfOutputStream stream, Object... strs)
      Write a collection of elements to the document stream as PDF object.
      protected static void writeRaw(PdfOutputStream stream, boolean addNewLine, byte... bytes)
      Write the specified bytes in the PDF.

        public PdfExporter()

    • Method Detail

      • isShadowSupported

        public boolean isShadowSupported()
        Replies if this exporter is able to create shadows of the vectorials figures.
        Returns:
        true if the exporter is able to create shadows; false if not.

      • isSpecificationCompliant

        public final boolean isSpecificationCompliant()
        Replies if this exporter is able to create a target file inside which all the specifications from ViewGraphics2D were supported.
        Returns:
        true if the exporter completely support the ViewGraphics2D specifications; false if a part of the specifications are not supported.

      • createStream

        protected PdfOutputStream createStream(File currentFile,
                           OutputStream stream)
                                throws IOException
        Wrap the specified stream to a stream that may be properly used by the exporter.
        Specified by:
        createStream in class AbstractVectorialExporter<PdfGraphics2D,PdfOutputStream>
        Parameters:
        currentFile - is the name of the file currently under creation; may be null.
        stream - is the stream to wrap.
        Returns:
        the wrapping stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • size

        protected static int size(PdfOutputStream stream)
                   throws IOException
        Replies the size of the stream.
        Parameters:
        stream -
        Returns:
        the size of the stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • writeRaw

        protected static void writeRaw(PdfOutputStream stream,
            boolean addNewLine,
            byte... bytes)
                        throws IOException
        Write the specified bytes in the PDF.
        Parameters:
        stream -
        addNewLine - indicates if a new line character must be added at the end.
        bytes -
        Throws:
        IOException

      • writeln

        protected static boolean writeln(PdfOutputStream stream,
              Object... text)
                          throws IOException
        Write the specified objects as strings in the output stream. The passed objects are converted to strings.
        Parameters:
        stream - is the stream to write in.
        text - are the Objects to be written to the document stream.
        Returns:
        true if something was written in the stream; otherwise false.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        protected static boolean write(PdfOutputStream stream,
            Object... text)
                        throws IOException
        Write the specified objects as strings in the output stream. The passed objects are converted to strings.
        Parameters:
        stream - is the stream to write in.
        text - are the Objects to be written to the document stream.
        Returns:
        true if something was written in the stream; otherwise false.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • writePdfObject

        protected static void writePdfObject(int id,
                  PdfOutputStream stream,
                  Object... strs)
                              throws IOException
        Write a collection of elements to the document stream as PDF object. The passed objects are converted to strings.
        Parameters:
        id - is the identifier of the object.
        stream - is the stream to write in.
        strs - Objects to be written to the document stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • writePdfDictionary

        protected static void writePdfDictionary(PdfOutputStream stream,
                      Object... strs)
                                  throws IOException
        Write a PDF dictionary from the specified collection of objects. The passed objects are converted to strings. Every object with odd position is used as key, every object with even position is used as value.
        Parameters:
        stream - is the stream to write inside.
        strs - Objects to be written to dictionary
        Throws:
        IOException

      • prepareExport

        protected PdfGraphics2D prepareExport(File currentFile,
                          PdfOutputStream stream,
                          Rectangle2f bounds)
                               throws IOException
        Create the graphics context to use to export the data.
        Specified by:
        prepareExport in class AbstractVectorialExporter<PdfGraphics2D,PdfOutputStream>
        Parameters:
        currentFile - is the name of the file currently under creation; may be null.
        stream - is the output stream, never null.
        bounds - are the bounds of the document.
        Returns:
        the graphics context to use to export the data.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • finalizeExport

        protected void finalizeExport(File currentFile,
                  PdfOutputStream stream,
                  Rectangle2f bounds,
                  PdfGraphics2D graphicContext)
                       throws IOException
        Invoked to finalize the export.
        Specified by:
        finalizeExport in class AbstractVectorialExporter<PdfGraphics2D,PdfOutputStream>
        Parameters:
        currentFile - is the name of the file currently under creation; may be null.
        stream - is the output stream, never null.
        bounds - are the bounds of the document.
        graphicContext - is the grapihcal context used to generate the vector picture.
        Throws:
        IOException
